---

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `200 OK`
    
- **Body**:
    

``` json
{
  "id": "1bd05512-e694-4f0e-b182-bbe30ba7b613",
  "budgetId": "137793ab-efb6-4af7-a287-dd864cda336b",
  "allocationId": "324b5750-c827-4a6b-a670-c9297c832f4e",
  "origin": "manual-adjustment",
  "reference": "f0e2b16b-ad4c-485d-adb2-84c78d9354e7",
  "amount": 480,
  "requestedBy": "Declan.McKenzie85@gmail.com",
  "date": "2025-07-22T20:41:49.8362594Z",
  "type": "CREDIT",
  "contextType": "UNIT",
  "contextId": "093f29ac-7a1b-4d6b-a79a-48f89cf73d14"
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | The ID of the transaction. |
| `budgetId` | `string` | The ID of the associated budget. |
| `allocationId` | `string` | The ID of the associated allocation within the budget. |
| `origin` | `string` | The origin or source of the transaction. |
| `reference` | `string` | A reference ID tied to the transaction (e.g., order ID). |
| `amount` | `number` | The amount involved in the transaction. |
| `requestedBy` | `string` | The email of the user who requested the transaction. |
| `date` | `string` | Transaction date (ISO format). |
| `type` | `string` | Type of transaction (`DEBIT`, meaning a regular transaction or `CREDIT` indicating a refund). |
| `contextType` | `string` | Type of context (e.g., `PROMOTIONS`, `UNIT`, `USER`). |
| `contextId` | `string` | Identifier of the corresponding context type. |

item.description: With these endpoints you can create and manage budget transactions.

A budget is a financial management tool that enables organizations to plan and monitor expenses, ensuring resources are allocated efficiently and in compliance with strategic criteria.

The Budget API is a comprehensive budget management service that allows you to create, manage, and control budgets, allocations, transactions, and reservations.

This endpoints' collection manages the expenses of your store, promoting finantial transparency, traceability, and control.

item.name: Custom Fields

request.description:
Creates a document containing custom fields' settings for a given contract. You can set up multiple custom fields by sending multiple objects in the `customFields` array.

There are four types of custom fields currently accepted. For each of them that you wish to configure, you must send the exact `name` from the list below:

- `PO Number`
    
- `Cost Center`
    
- `Release`
    
- `Location`
    

---

### Request

- **Method**: `POST`
    
- **URL**: `https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldSettings/documents`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

#### Request Body

``` json
{
  "id": "{{contractId}}",
  "customFields": [
    {
      "name": "{{customFieldName}}",
      "enabled": true,
      "required": true,
      "level": "{{level}}",
      "type": "option"
    }
  ]
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | Yes | The ID of the contract. |
| `customFields` | `array of objects` | Yes | An array of custom field settings. |
| `customFields[].name` | `string` | Yes | The name of the custom field. Currently, the accepted values are: `PO Number`, `Cost Center`, `Release`, `Location`. |
| `customFields[].enabled` | `boolean` | Yes | Indicates if the custom field is enabled. |
| `customFields[].required` | `boolean` | Yes | Indicates if the custom field is required. |
| `customFields[].level` | `string` | Yes | The level at which the custom field applies (`order`, `item`, `address`). |
| `customFields[].type` | `string` | Yes | The field type. Although `option`, `number`, and `text` are supported in theory, currently **only** `option` **is accepted**. |

**Note**:

---

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `200 OK`
    
- **Body**:
    

``` json
{
  "Id": "customFieldSettings-c90354e8-08d6-11f0-b37f-daebda928cfa",
  "Href": "http://qastore.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldSettings/documents/c90354e8-08d6-11f0-b37f-daebda928cfa",
  "DocumentId": "c90354e8-08d6-11f0-b37f-daebda928cfa"
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Id` | `string` | Unique identifier of the created document. |
| `Href` | `string` | Direct URL to access the created document. |
| `DocumentId` | `string` | The document ID without the data entity prefix. |

Retrieves the settings of a given custom field.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `GET`
    
- **URL**: `https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldSettings/documents/{{contractId}}?_fields=_all`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

This request does not require a request body.

---

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `200 OK`
    

``` json
{
  "id": "ccd899ec-1701-11f0-b37f-c823fcd1b41a",
  "dataEntityId": "customFieldSettings",
  "accountId": "5f1fe23b-9fd1-417d-a4aa-14df38e7746e",
  "accountName": "qastore",
  "followers": [],
  "schemas": [],
  "customFields": [
    {
      "id": "{{customFieldId}}",
      "enabled": true,
      "required": true,
      "level": "order|item|address",
      "type": "option"
    }
  ],
  "createdBy": "c83ea7ed-f875-4a10-b0a0-98d96aedab06",
  "createdBy_USER": {
    "Id": "c83ea7ed-f875-4a10-b0a0-98d96aedab06",
    "Login": "frederico.mourao@vtex.com",
    "Name": null
  },
  "createdIn": "2025-04-11T18:21:43.1059453Z",
 ```

| `dataInstanceId` | `string` | The ID of the data instance. |

Deletes all custom fields settings associated with a given contract.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `DELETE`
    
- **URL**: `https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldSettings/documents/{{contractId}}`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

This request does not require a request body.

---

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `204 No Content`
    
- **Description**: The document was successfully deleted. No content is returned in the response body.

Updates the configuration of all custom fields for a specific contract in the VTEX Data Entity. This includes enabling/disabling a custom field, marking it as required, and defining its scope and type.

The entire list of custom field settings must be provided in the PATCH request — partial updates are not supported. Because of this, to update custom field settings, we recommend the following steps:

1. Use the Get Custom Field Settings request described above to get the current settings.
    
2. Copy the settings array and change the values you wish to update.
    
3. Send this request with the complete updated settings.
    

---

### **Request**

- **Method**: `PATCH`
    
- **URL**: `https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldSettings/documents/{{contractId}}`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

#### **Request Body**

``` json
{
  "id": "{{contractId}}",
  "customFields": [
    {
      "name": "{{customFieldName}}",
      "enabled": true,
      "required": true,
      "level": "{{level}}",
      "type": "option"
    }
  ]
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | Yes | The ID of the profile (contract) to update. |
| `customFields` | `array of objects` | Yes | List of custom field configuration objects. |
| `customFields[].name` | `string` | Yes | The unique identifier (name) of the custom field. |
| `customFields[].enabled` | `boolean` | Yes | Whether this custom field is active. |
| `customFields[].required` | `boolean` | Yes | Whether this custom field must be filled. |
| `customFields[].level` | `string` | Yes | The scope where the custom field is applied. One of: `order`, `item`, `address`. |
| `customFields[].type` | `string` | Yes | The field type. Although `text`, `number`, and `option` are supported in theory, currently **only** `option` **is accepted**. |

_Important Notes_:

- Partial updates are not supported. You must submit the full list of custom field settings in every request.
    
- The `type` field accepts only `option` for now, even if other values are theoretically supported.
    

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `200 OK`
    
- **Body**:
    

``` json
{
  "Id": "customFieldSettings-c90354e8-08d6-11f0-b37f-daebda928cfa",
  "Href": "http://qastore.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldSettings/documents/c90354e8-08d6-11f0-b37f-daebda928cfa"
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Id` | `string` | Unique identifier of the created document. |
| `Href` | `string` | Direct URL to access the created document. |

``` json
}
 ```

request.description:
Deletes all custom fields settings associated with a given contract.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `DELETE`
    
- **URL**: https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldSettings/documents/{{contractId}}?_schema=v2
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

This request does not require a request body.

---

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `204 No Content`
    
- **Description**: The document was successfully deleted. No content is returned in the response body.

This endpoint allows you to enable or disable a custom field, mark it as required, define the level (`item`, `order`or `address`), and set its type (`text`, `number` or `option`).  
You can also provide optional `additionalData` for custom validations, allowed values, or integration rules.  
Each request handles a single `customField` configuration. The field is identified by the system through its auto-generated id, while the `contractId` defines the contract to which it belongs.

---

### **Request**

- **Method**: `PATCH`
    
- **URL**: https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldSettings/documents/{{contractId}}?_schema=v2
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

#### **Request Body**

``` json
{ 
"contractId": "{{contractId}}", 
"name": "{{customFieldName}}", 
"enabled": true, 
"required": false, 
"level": "{{level}}", 
"type": "option", 
"additionalData": "{{additionalData}}" 
}

 ```

| **Field** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `contractId` | string | Yes | The contract ID to which the custom field belongs. |
| `name` | string | Yes | The custom field name. Accepted values: `PO Number`, `Cost Center`, `Release`, `Location`. |
| `enabled` | boolean | Yes | Indicates whether the custom field is enabled (`true`) or not (`false`). |
| `required` | boolean | Yes | Indicates whether the custom field is mandatory (`true`) or optional (`false`). |
| `level` | string | Yes | The level at which the custom field applies. Possible values: `item`, `order`, `address`. |
| `type` | string | Yes | The value type of the custom field. Possible values: `text`, `number`, `option`. |
| `additionalData` | string | No | Extra data associated with the custom field . |

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `200 No Content`

item.name: Values Management (Legacy)

request.description:
Creates a value for an existing custom field for a given contract.

> If you are creating a value for a custom field configured with level `address`, you must send a valid address ID in the field `auxId`. 
  

---

### Request

- **Method**: `POST`
    
- **URL**: `https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldValues/documents`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

#### Request Body

``` json
{
  "name": "{{customFieldName}}",
  "contractId": "{{contractId}}",
  "auxId": null,
  "value": "{{value}}"
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | Yes | The name of the custom field. Currently, the accepted values are: `PO Number`, `Cost Center`, `Release`, `Location`. |
| `contractId` | `string` | Yes | The ID of the contract associated with the field. |
| `auxId` | `null` | No | Address ID. Required only if the configured custom field level is `address`. |
| `value` | `string` | Yes | The value to be stored for the custom field. |

---

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `200 OK`
    
- **Body**:
    

``` json
{
  "Id": "customFields-07d12677-08d8-11f0-b37f-e1ae31409099",
  "Href": "http://qastore.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFields/documents/07d12677-08d8-11f0-b37f-e1ae31409099",
  "DocumentId": "07d12677-08d8-11f0-b37f-e1ae31409099"
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Id` | `string` | Unique identifier of the created value. |
| `Href` | `string` | Direct URL to access the value document created. |
| `DocumentId` | `string` | The value ID without the data entity prefix. |

Updates the value of a custom field for a given contract.

### Request

- **Method**: `PATCH`
    
- **URL**: `https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldValues/documents/{{customFieldValueId}}`

#### Request Body

``` json
{
  "value": "CC3"
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | Yes | The new value for the custom field. |

---

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `204 No Content`
    
- **Description**: The custom field value was successfully updated. No content is returned in the response body.

| `name` | `string` | The name of the custom field. |
| `auxId` | `string` | Address ID. Used only for custom fields configured with level `address`. |
| `value` | `string` | The value stored in the custom field. |

Retrieves all custom field values, filtered by contract ID and custom field name, and returns them sorted by value.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `GET`
    
- **URL**: `https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldValues/search`
    
- **Query Parameters**:
    
    - `_schema=v1`
        
    - `_fields=id,contractId,name,auxId,value`
        
    - `_where=contractId={{contractId}} AND name="{{customField}}"`
        
    - `_sort=value=name ASC`
        
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

No body is required for this request.

---

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `200 OK`
    
- **Body**:
    

``` json
[
  {
    "id": "e5130781-32ed-11f0-b37f-942217c27f9b",
    "contractId": "1124b2d8-32eb-11f0-b37f-e2557e6b18d5",
    "name": "PO Number",
    "auxId": null,
    "value": "{{value}}"
  }
]

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | The ID of the custom field value document. |
| `contractId` | `string` | The ID of the contract associated with the field. |
| `name` | `string` | The name of the custom field. |
| `auxId` | `string` | Address ID. Used only for custom fields configured with level `address`. |
| `value` | `string` | The value stored in the custom field. |

item.description:
Once you have set up a custom field, you can use the APIs below to manage their value for specific contracts.

Every custom field value is associated with a specific contract and may also be associated with a specific address, in case the defined custom field level is `address`. The address ID associated with the custom field value is represented in the field `auxId`.

item.name: Values Management v2

request.description:
Creates a value for an existing custom field for a given contract.

> If you are creating a value for a custom field configured with level `address`, you must send a valid address ID in the field `auxId`. 
  

---

### Request

- **Method**: `POST`
    
- **URL**: https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldValues/documents?_schema=v2
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

#### Request Body

``` json
{
  "contractId": "{{contractId}}",
  "customFieldId": "{{customFieldId}}",
  "auxId": null,
  "value": "{{value}}",
  "description": "{{customField description}}"
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `contractId` | `string` | Yes | The ID of the contract associated with the field. |
| `customFieldId` | `string` | Yes | The ID of the custom field. Which is automatically generated in Create Custom Field Settings. |
| `auxId` | `null` | No | Address ID. Required only if the configured custom field level is `address`. |
| `value` | `string` | Yes | The value to be stored for the custom field. |
| `description` | `string` | No | Details what the value represents. |

---

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `200 OK`
    
- **Body**:
    

``` json
{
  "Id": "customFields-07d12677-08d8-11f0-b37f-e1ae31409099",
  "Href": "http://qastore.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFields/documents/07d12677-08d8-11f0-b37f-e1ae31409099",
  "DocumentId": "07d12677-08d8-11f0-b37f-e1ae31409099"
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Id` | `string` | Unique identifier of the created value. |
| `Href` | `string` | Direct URL to access the value document created. |
| `DocumentId` | `string` | The value ID without the data entity prefix. |

Updates the value of a specific custom field for a given contract.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `PATCH`
    
- **URL**: https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldValues/documents/{{customFieldValueId}}?_schema=v2
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

#### Request Body

``` json
{
  "contractId": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "customFieldId": "a7f2b3d4-5c6e-7f89-0123-456789abcdef",
  "auxId": "optionalAuxId",
  "value": "CC3",
  "description": "Details about the value"
}

 ```

| **Field** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `contractId` | string | Yes | The ID of the contract to which the custom field belongs. |
| `customFieldId` | string | Yes | The ID of the custom field (from the customFieldSettings document). |
| `auxId` | string (null) | No | Optional auxiliary ID to further specify the context. |
| `value` | string | Yes | The new value for the custom field (max length 22). |
| `description` | string | No | Optional description explaining what the value represents. |

---

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `204 No Content`
    
- **Description**: The custom field value was successfully updated. No content is returned in the response body.

Retrieves a specific custom field value document.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `GET`
    
- **URL**: https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldValues/documents/{{customFieldValueId}}?_fields=_all&_schema=v2
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

This request does not contain a request body.


| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | string | The ID of the custom field value document. |
| `dataEntityId` | string | The ID of the data entity (`customFieldValues`). |
| `accountId` | string | Unique identifier of the VTEX account. |
| `accountName` | string | Name of the VTEX account. |
| `followers` | array | Array of followers for this document. |
| `schemas` | array | Array of schemas associated with this document. |

item.description:
Once you have set up a custom field, you can use the APIs below to manage their value for specific contracts.

Every custom field value is associated with a specific contract and may also be associated with a specific address, in case the defined custom field level is `address`. The address ID associated with the custom field value is represented in the field `auxId`.

item.name: Create or update custom field in orderForm

request.description:
### Request

- **Method**: `PUT`
    
- **URL**: `{{baseUrl}}/api/checkout/pub/orderForm/{{orderFormId}}/customFields/{{linkedEntity.type}}/{{linkedEntity.id}}`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

Creates or updates a custom field in the orderForm.

#### Path Parameters

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| orderFormId | integer | true | Unique identifier for a customer's shopping cart. |
| linkedEntity.type | string | true | Data entity type, which can be one of the following: `order` `item` `address`. |
| linkedEntity.id | string | false | Unique identifier of the entity value being included in the orderForm. Required only for `item` and `address` entity types, not for `order`. |

### Request Body

``` json
{
"name":"Cost Center",
"value":"CC3",
"refId":"1dd9eeb8-23ed-42b3-8028-dc7745c01ada"
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| name | string | true | Custom field name. |
| value | string | true | Custom field value, limited to 50 characters. |
| refId | string | false | A reference ID that can be used to tie the custom field to external providers. For example, a Cost Center ID. |

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `200 OK`
    
- **Body**: The response will be the orderForm updated.
    

``` json
{
   "customData":{
      ...,
      "customFields":[
         {
            "linkedEntity":{
               "type":"item",
               "id":"B2949D0A45244825B177D2F9F96DC711"
            },
            "fields":[
                {
                    "name": "Cost Center",
                    "value": "CC3",
            "refId": "1dd9eeb8-23ed-42b3-8028-dc7745c01ada"
                }
            ]
         }
      ]
   },
   ...
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Nullable | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| linkedEntity | object | false | Data entity information. |
| linkedEntity{ }.type | string | false | Data entity type, which can be one of the following: `order` `item` `address`. |
| linkedEntity{ }.id | string | true | Data entity ID. This field is nullable when the entity type is `order`. |
| fields\[ \] | array of objects | false | List with information about the custom field created or updated in the orderForm. |
| fields\[ \]{ }.name | string | false | Custom field name. |
| fields\[ \]{ }.value | string | false | Custom field value. |
| fields\[ \]{ }.refId | string | true | A reference ID that can be used to tie the custom field to external providers. For example, a Cost Center ID. |

item.name: Create or update custom fields in orderForm in batch

request.description:
## Request

- **Method**: `DELETE`
    
- **URL**: `{{baseUrl}}/api/checkout/pub/orderForm/{{orderFormId}}/customFields/{{linkedEntity.type}}/{{linkedEntity.id}}/{fieldName}`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

Removes a field from a custom field in an orderForm given a field name.

This endpoint doesn’t require a request body.

### Path Parameters

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| orderFormId | integer | true | Unique identifier for a customer's shopping cart. |
| linkedEntity.type | string | true | Data entity type, which can be one of the following: `order` `item` `address`. |
| linkedEntity.id | string | false | Unique identifier of the entity value being included in the orderForm. Required only for `item` and `address` entity types, not for `order`. |
| fieldName | string | true | Custom field name. |

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `200 OK`
    
- **Body**: The response will be the orderForm updated.
    

``` json
{
   "customData":{
      ...,
      "customFields":[
         {
            "linkedEntity":{
               "type":"item",
               "id":"B2949D0A45244825B177D2F9F96DC711"
            },
            "fields":[
                {
                    "name": "Cost Center",
                    "value": "CC3",
            "refId": "1dd9eeb8-23ed-42b3-8028-dc7745c01ada"
                }
            ]
         }
      ]
   },
   ...
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Nullable | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| linkedEntity | object | false | Data entity information. |
| linkedEntity{ }.type | string | false | Data entity type, which can be one of the following: `order` `item` `address` |
| linkedEntity{ }.id | string | true | Data entity ID. This field is nullable when the entity type is `order`. |
| fields\[ \] | array of objects | false | List with information about the custom field created or updated in the orderForm. |
| fields\[ \]{ }.name | string | false | Custom field name. |
| fields\[ \]{ }.value | string | false | Custom field value. |
| fields\[ \]{ }.refId | string | true | A reference ID that can be used to tie the custom field to external providers. For example, a Cost Center ID. |

item.description: You can configure custom fields to collect additional data during checkout, improving order tracking and compliance.

item.name: Default Values

request.description:
Creates a document with a set of default values for a specific organization unit.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `POST`
    
- **URL**: `https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/defaultValues/documents`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

#### Request Body

``` json
{
  "id": "orgUnitId-{{unit-id}}",
  "defaultValues": [
    {
      "entity": "address/shipping",
      "entityValueId": "cf6b85ab9-8e0a-4e49-9f1a-b48286c913a4"
    },
    {
      "entity": "address/billing",
      "entityValueId": "f6b85ab9-8e0a-4e49-9f1a-b48286c913a4"
    },
    {
      "entity": "creditCard",
      "entityValueId": "e5a80ff0-c243-4258-a2b1-f93492af46ec"
    }
  ]
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | Yes | ID of the organizational Unit prefixed with `orgUnitId-`. |
| `defaultValues` | `array` | Yes | An array of default value objects. |
| `defaultValues[].entity` | `string` | Yes | The name of the entity (e.g., `address/shipping`, `creditCard`). |
| `defaultValues[].entityValueId` | `string` | Yes | The ID of the entity value associated to the entity. |

---

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `200 OK`
    
- **Body**:
    

``` json
{
  "Id": "customFieldSettings-c90354e8-08d6-11f0-b37f-daebda928cfa",
  "Href": "http://qastore.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/customFieldSettings/documents/c90354e8-08d6-11f0-b37f-daebda928cfa",
  "DocumentId": "c90354e8-08d6-11f0-b37f-daebda928cfa"
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Id` | `string` | Unique identifier of the created document. |
| `Href` | `string` | Direct link to the created document. |
| `DocumentId` | `string` | The document ID (same value as in `Id` without prefix). |

Updates the default values for a specific organization unit.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `PATCH`
    
- **URL**: `https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/defaultValues/documents/orgUnitId-{{unit}}`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

#### Request Body

``` json
{
  "id": "orgUnitId-{{unit}}",
  "defaultValues": [
    {
      "entity": "address/shipping",
      "entityValueId": "cf6b85ab9-8e0a-4e49-9f1a-b48286c913a4"
    },
    {
      "entity": "address/billing",
      "entityValueId": "f6b85ab9-8e0a-4e49-9f1a-b48286c913a4"
    },
    {
      "entity": "creditCard",
      "entityValueId": "e5a80ff0-c243-4258-a2b1-f93492af46ec"
    }
  ]
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | Yes | ID of the organizational Unit prefixed with `orgUnitId-`. |
| `defaultValues` | `array` | Yes | A list of default value entries. |
| `defaultValues[].entity` | `string` | Yes | The name of the entity (e.g., `address/shipping`, `creditCard`). |
| `defaultValues[].entityValueId` | `string` | Yes | The unique ID of the associated entity value. |

**Note**: You must provide the complete list of default values. Partial updates are not supported.

---

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `204 No Content`
    
- **Description**: The default values were successfully updated. No content is returned in the response body.

Deletes all default values for a specific organization unit.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `DELETE`
    
- **URL**: `https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/defaultValues/documents/orgUnitId-{{unit}}`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    

This endpoint does not require a request body.

---

### Response

#### Success Response

- **Status Code**: `201 Created`
    
- **Description**: The default values document for the specified organization unit has been successfully deleted.
    

#### Error Responses

- **404 Not Found**: The document with the specified organization unit ID does not exist.

item.description: Default values are purchase details, such as addresses and credit cards, that you can configure for an organizational unit to be automatically pre-filled at checkout.

item.name: Contact Information

request.description:
This endpoint creates new contact information.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `POST`
    
- **URL**: `https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/contact_information/documents?_schema=v1`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    
- **Content-Type**: `application/json`
    

### Query

| **Parameter** | **Type** | Required | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `_schema` | `string` | Yes | Schema version. |

---

### Request body

``` json
{
    "email": "rafael.silva@example.com",
    "firstName": "Rafael",
    "lastName": "Silva",
    "profileId": "878fa807-7c7b-4ad3-aaa6-e3ef4fb22b8f",
    "phone": "+1 212 555 1234",
    "phoneExtension": "123",
    "document": "112-3456789",
    "documentType": "EIN",
 ```

item.description:
Contacts is a list of the people who receive store's shipments. The contact for each order is distinct from the person who placed the order, so when a shopper is placing the order, they need to inform who will be the receiver from the aforementioned contacts.

These endpoints manage contact information.

item.name: Buying Policies
Dimensions

request.description:
This endpoint retrieves a list with dimensions information.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `GET`
    
- **URL**: `https://api.vtexcommercestable.com.br/{{accountName}}/authorization-dimensions`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    
- **Content-Type**: `application/vnd.vtex.create-budget+json`
    

---

### Response body

``` json
[
    {
        "id": "c391298c-6c74-431f-a6f8-a8ae0e5bf420",
        "name": "Dimension Monitoring - Dimension CRUD test",
        "unitId": null,
        "status": null,
        "priority": 1,
        "shouldSimulate": true,
        "ruleCollection": [
            {
                "id": "36f6fa52-231c-4a16-963d-f2347cebae60",
                "name": "Rule Monitoring 1 - Rule CRUD test",
                "status": null,
                "priority": 1,
                "trigger": {
                    "condition": {
                        "conditionType": 1,
                        "description": "Rule Monitoring 1 - Rule CRUD test- Description",
                        "lessThan": 30.0,
                        "greatherThan": 0.01,
                        "expression": null
                    },
                    "effect": {
                        "description": "Rule Monitoring 1 - Rule CRUD test - Effect Description",
                        "effectType": 2
                    }
                },
                "timeout": 5000,
                "notification": false,
                "scoreInterval": {
                    "accept": 51,
                    "deny": 49
                }
            },
            {
                "id": "a2cd4605-1765-4e95-80e8-018a3223e2be",
                "name": "Rule Monitoring test",
                "status": null,
                "priority": 2,
                "trigger": {
                    "condition": {
                        "conditionType": 1,
                        "description": "Condition Description",
                        "lessThan": 90.0,
                        "greatherThan": 10.0,
                        "expression": null
                    },
                    "effect": {
                        "description": "Efect Description",
                        "effectType": 2
                    }
                },
                "timeout": 500,
                "notification": true,
                "scoreInterval": {
                    "accept": 10,
                    "deny": 5
                }
            }
        ],
        "creationDate": "2025-06-16T17:01:42.0989019Z",
        "creationVersion": "2.0.7",
        "creationEnvironment": "stable"
    }
]

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | Unique identifier of the dimension. |
| `name` | `string` | Name of the dimension. |
| `unitId` | `string` | Identifier of the organizational unit this dimension belongs to. |
| `status` | `string` | Status of the dimension. Can be used to control activation. |
| `priority` | `number` | Execution priority of the dimension. Lower numbers are evaluated first. |
| `shouldSimulate` | `boolean` | Indicates if the rules should be simulated instead of enforced. |
| `ruleCollection` | `array of objects` | List of rules contained within the dimension. |
| `ruleCollection.id` | `string` | Unique identifier of the rule. |
| `ruleCollection.name` | `string` | Name of the rule. |
| `ruleCollection.status` | `string` | Current status of the rule. |
| `ruleCollection.priority` | `number` | Rule execution priority within the dimension. |
| `ruleCollection.trigger.condition.conditionType` | `number` | Type of the condition logic (e.g., numerical range, expression). |
| `ruleCollection.trigger.condition.description` | `string` | Description of the condition being evaluated. |
| `ruleCollection.trigger.condition.lessThan` | `number` | Maximum value allowed for validation. |
| `ruleCollection.trigger.condition.greatherThan` | `number` | Minimum value allowed for validation. |
| `ruleCollection.trigger.condition.expression` | `string` | Expression to evaluate if applicable. |
| `ruleCollection.trigger.effect.description` | `string` | Description of the effect applied if condition is met. |
| `ruleCollection.trigger.effect.effectType` | `number` | Type of effect to apply (e.g., accept, deny, pending). |
| `ruleCollection.timeout` | `number` | Time in milliseconds to wait for rule evaluation. |
| `ruleCollection.notification` | `boolean` | Whether a notification should be triggered. |
| `ruleCollection.scoreInterval.accept` | `number` | Minimum score required to accept the order. Default is `51`. |
| `ruleCollection.scoreInterval.deny` | `number` | Maximum score allowed to deny the order. Default is `49`. |
| `creationDate` | `string` | Date when the dimension was created (ISO 8601). |
| `creationVersion` | `string` | Version of the system at creation time. |
| `creationEnvironment` | `string` | Environment in which the dimension was created (e.g., `stable`, `beta`). |

This endpoint deletes a specific dimension by its ID.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `DELETE`

- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    
- **Content-Type**: `application/vnd.vtex.create-budget+json`
    

### Paramenters

| Parameter | **Type** | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `dimensionId` | `string` | Yes | Dimension identifier. |

---

### Response body

``` json
{}

 ```

item.description: A dimension is a container that groups authorization rules for a specific organization unit. All buying policies (rules) belonging to that unit are stored within this single dimension. Dimensions are also known as "buying policy groups".

item.name: Rules

request.description:
This endpoint registers a new diumension rule.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `POST`
    
- **URL**: `https://api.vtexcommercestable.com.br/{{accountName}}/authorization-dimensions/{{dimensionId}}/rules`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    
- **Content-Type**: `application/json`
    

### Parameters

| Parameter | **Type** | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `dimensionId` | `string` | Yes | Identifier for the authorization dimension. |

---

### Request Body

``` json
{
            "name": "User Approval - Many approvers",
            "priority": 1,
            "trigger": {
                "condition": {
                    "conditionType": 2,
                    "description": "Users 8f6b3712-4c05-4ce5-8057-63fd0d69a587 and 8f6b3712-4c05-4ce5-8057-63fd0d69a588 needs to approve orders above $150",
                    "expression": "$.openTextField.value = 'ODP use cases' and $.value > 30000"
                },
                "effect": {
                    "description": "Orders with value above $150 must be approved",
                    "effectType": 2
                }
            },
            "authorizationData": {
                "requireAllApprovals": true,
                "authorizers": [
                    {
                        "id": "8f6b3712-4c05-4ce5-8057-63fd0d69a587",
                        "type": "User"
                    },
                    {
                        "id": "8f6b3712-4c05-4ce5-8057-63fd0d69a588",
                        "type": "User"
                    }
                ]
            },
            "scoreInterval": {
                "accept": 51,
                "deny": 49
            }
        }

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | Yes | Unique identifier of the rule. |
| `name` | `string` | Yes | Name of the rule. |
| `priority` | `number` | Yes | Execution priority of the rule within the dimension. |
| `trigger.condition.conditionType` | `number` | Yes | Type of condition logic (e.g., numerical range, expression). |
| `trigger.condition.description` | `string` | Yes | Description of the condition being evaluated. |
| `trigger.condition.expression` | `string` | No | Expression used for evaluation, if applicable. |
| `trigger.effect.description` | `string` | Yes | Description of the effect to be applied if condition is met. |
| `trigger.effect.effectType` | `number` | Yes | Type of effect (e.g., accept, deny, pending). |
| `timeout` | `number` | Yes | Maximum time (ms) allowed for rule evaluation. |
| `notification` | `boolean` | Yes | Whether a notification should be triggered if the rule is evaluated. |
| `scoreInterval.accept` | `number` | Yes | Minimum score required to accept the rule. |
| `scoreInterval.deny` | `number` | Yes | Maximum score allowed to deny the rule. |
| `authorizationData` | `object` | No | Defines required authorizers and whether all must approve. |
| `authorizationData.requireAllApprovals` | `boolean` | No | Condition that makes all authorizers approvals to be required. |
| `authorizationData.authorizers` | `array of objects` | Yes | List of entities that can authorize the action. |
| `authorizationData.authorizers[].type` | `string` | Yes | Type of authorizer (e.g., `unit`, `user`). |
| `authorizationData.authorizers[].id` | `string` | Yes | Unique identifier of the authorizer. |

### Response

``` json

]
 ```

| └─ `condition` | `object` | Condition that triggers the rule evaluation. |

| └── `description` | `string` | Description of the condition. |

| └── `effectType` | `number` | Type of effect. |

| `timeout` | `number` | Timeout in milliseconds. |
| `notification` | `boolean` | Whether to trigger a notification. |
| `scoreInterval` | `object` | Score interval information. |
| └─ `accept` | `number` | Score interval to automatically accept. |
| └─ `deny` | `number` | Score interval to automatically deny. |

request.description:
This endpoint denies a dimension rule.

---

- **Method**: `POST`

- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    
- **Content-Type**: `application/json`
    

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `orderAuthId` | `string` | Yes | Identifier for the authorization dimension. |

---

### Request Body

``` json
{
    "params": {
        "score": 0,
        "dimensionId": "{{dimensionId}}",
        "ruleId": "{{ruleId}}"
    }
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| params | Object | Yes | Container for the parameters of the request. |
| params.score | Integer | Yes | Score value to be assigned. Denial value depends on the rule configuration. In general, a `score` of `0` denies the rule. |

| params.ruleId | String | Yes | Identifier of the rule associated with the dimension. |

item.description:
A condition–action pair inside a dimension that defines how the system evaluates and authorizes operations.  
  
Each rule includes a condition (`trigger.condition`) and an effect (`trigger.effect`), determining whether an action is approved, denied, or sent for manual approval.

Rules are also known as "buying policies" and are nested within dimensions (or "buying policy groups").

item.name: Order

request.description:
This endpoint creates a new order.

---

### Request

- **Method**: `PUT`
    
- **URL**: `https://{{account}}.myvtex.com/api/checkout/pub/orders`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    
- **Content-Type**: `application/json`
    

---

| ↳--- `href` | `string` | The relative URL to access the interaction details. |
| `settlements` | `object` | Contains the API endpoint for transaction settlements. |
| `payments` | `object` | Contains the API endpoint for the payments within the transaction. |
| `refunds` | `object` | Contains the API endpoint for refunds associated with the transaction. |
| `cancellations` | `object` | Contains the API endpoint for cancellations. |
| `capabilities` | `object` | Contains the API endpoint to view available transaction capabilities. |
| `timeoutStatus` | `number` | A status code indicating if the transaction is timed out. |
| `totalRefunds` | `number` | The total value that has been refunded for this transaction. |
| `status` | `string` | The current status of the transaction (e.g., 'Finished', 'Authorized'). |
| `value` | `number` | The total value of the transaction, in cents. |
| `receiverUri` | `null` | The endpoint URL for the payment receiver. |
| `startDate` | `string` | The timestamp when the transaction was initiated. |
| `authorizationToken` | `string` | A token received from the payment gateway upon successful authorization. |
| `authorizationDate` | `string` | The timestamp when the payment was authorized. |
| `commitmentToken` | `string` | A token confirming the commitment or capture of the funds. |
| `commitmentDate` | `string` | The timestamp when the funds were committed or captured. |
| `fields` | `array` | A list of key-value pairs containing miscellaneous data about the transaction. |
| ↳- `name` | `string` | The name of the data field (e.g., 'currencyCode', 'cart', 'clientProfileData'). |
| ↳- `value` | `string` | The value of the data field. |
| `currencyCode` | `string` | The three-letter ISO currency code for the transaction (e.g., `USD`). |
| `shopperInteraction` | `string` | The type of interaction through which the transaction was made. |
| `ipAddress` | `string` | The IP address of the shopper at the time of the transaction. |
| `owner` | `string` | The service or application that created the transaction. |
| `orderId` | `string` | The identifier for the order associated with this transaction. |
| `userAgent` | `string` | The user agent string of the shopper's browser or client. |
| `acceptHeader` | `string` | The Accept header from the shopper's HTTP request. |
| `channel` | `string` | The name of the store or channel where the transaction occurred. |
| `salesChannel` | `string` | The ID of the sales channel (trade policy) used for the transaction. |
| `softDescriptor` | `null` | The text that appears on the customer's credit card statement. |
| `markedForRecurrence` | `boolean` | A flag indicating if this transaction is part of a recurring payment schedule. |
| `buyer` | `object` | An object containing information about the buyer. |

item.description: The following endpoints allow interaction with client orders. They enable placing an order, processing its payment, and retrieving order information.

The Buying Policies system supports dynamic rules that merchants can configure to suit their specific authorization processes. It provides a mechanism for users to register custom rule expressions, offering greater flexibility and extensibility.

The approval process is hierarchical and sequential:

- Starts at the org unit where the order is placed.
    
- Moves up one org unit level at a time, only after all policies at the current level are approved.
    
- At each level, policies are applied in the order of their creation (from oldest to newest).

item.name: Auxiliar APIs

request.description:
**Official Doc:** [VTEX Payments Gateway API](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/payments-gateway-api#get-/api/pvt/merchants/payment-systems)

This endpoint retrieves a list of payment systems available for the merchant account.

---

### Request

**Method:** `GET`

**URL:**

``` plaintext
https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/payments/pvt/payment-systems/

 ```

**Headers:**

- `X-VTEX-API-AppKey`: Your VTEX App Key
    
- `X-VTEX-API-AppToken`: Your VTEX App Token
    

No request body is required.

---

### Response

**Status:** `200 OK`

**Content-Type:** `application/json`

Returns an array of payment system objects:

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | number | The ID of the payment system. |
| `name` | string | The name of the payment system. |
| `requiresDocument` | boolean | Whether a document is required. |
| `implementation` | string | Implementation details. |
| `connectorImplementation` | string | Connector implementation. |
| `antifraudConnectorImplementation` | string | Antifraud connector implementation. |
| `groupName` | string | Group name of the payment system. |
| `redirect` | boolean | Whether redirection is allowed. |
| `isCustom` | boolean | Whether it is a custom payment system. |
| `isSelfAuthorized` | boolean | Whether it is self-authorized. |
| `requiresAuthentication` | boolean | Whether authentication is required. |
| `allowInstallments` | boolean | Whether installments are allowed. |
| `allowBinExclusion` | boolean | Whether bin exclusion is allowed. |
| `allowMultiple` | boolean | Whether multiple payments are allowed. |
| `allowIssuer` | boolean | Whether issuer is allowed. |
| `allowCountry` | boolean | Whether country is allowed. |
| `allowCommercialPolicy` | boolean | Whether commercial policy is allowed. |
| `allowCommercialCondition` | boolean | Whether commercial condition is allowed. |
| `allowPeriod` | boolean | Whether period is allowed. |
| `isAvailable` | boolean | Whether the payment system is available. |
| `description` | string | Description of the payment system. |
| `supportRecurrence` | boolean | Whether recurrence is supported. |
| `validator` | object | Validation details. |
| `appDependencies` | array | List of application dependencies. |
| `displayDocument` | boolean | Whether document display is allowed. |
| `dueDate` | string | Due date of the payment system. |
| `allowNotification` | boolean | Whether notifications are allowed. |
| `affiliationId` | string | Affiliation ID. |
| `availablePayments` | null | Available payments. |
| `dueDateMinutes` | number | Due date in minutes. |

---

### Example Response

``` json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Credit Card",
    "requiresDocument": true,
    "implementation": "gateway-impl",
    "connectorImplementation": "connector-impl",
    "antifraudConnectorImplementation": "antifraud-impl",
    "groupName": "credit-card",
    "redirect": false,
    "isCustom": false,
    "isSelfAuthorized": false,
    "requiresAuthentication": true,
    "allowInstallments": true,
    "allowBinExclusion": true,
    "allowMultiple": true,
    "allowIssuer": true,
    "allowCountry": true,
    "allowCommercialPolicy": true,
    "allowCommercialCondition": true,
    "allowPeriod": true,
    "isAvailable": true,
    "description": "Standard Credit Card",
    "supportRecurrence": true,
    "validator": {},
    "appDependencies": [],
    "displayDocument": true,
    "dueDate": "2025-12-31T23:59:59Z",
    "allowNotification": true,
    "affiliationId": "aff-123",
    "availablePayments": null,
    "dueDateMinutes": 1440
  }
]

 ```

request.description:
**Official Documentation**: [VTEX Catalog API - GET /api/catalog_system/pvt/collection/search](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/catalog-api#get-/api/catalog_system/pvt/collection/search?endpoint=get-/api/catalog_system/pvt/collection/search)

This API endpoint allows retrieving catalog collection data from a VTEX account.

### Request

**Method:** `GET`

**URL:**

``` plaintext
https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/catalog_system/pvt/collection/search

 ```

### Response

A successful response returns a JSON object containing pagination information and an array of catalog collection items.

#### Example Response

``` json
{
  "paging": {
    "page": 0,
    "perPage": 0,
    "total": 0,
    "pages": 0,
    "limit": 0
  },
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "name": "",
      "searchable": true,
      "highlight": true,
      "dateFrom": "",
      "dateTo": "",
      "totalSku": 0,
      "totalProducts": 0,
      "type": "",
      "lastModifiedBy": null
    }
  ]
}

 ```

### Fields Description

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `paging.page` | number | Current page number. |
| `paging.perPage` | number | Number of items per page. |
| `paging.total` | number | Total number of items available. |
| `paging.pages` | number | Total number of pages available. |
| `paging.limit` | number | Maximum number of items per page. |
| `items` | array | Array of collection objects. |
| `items[].id` | number | ID of the collection. |
| `items[].name` | string | Name of the collection. |
| `items[].searchable` | boolean | Indicates if the collection is searchable. |
| `items[].highlight` | boolean | Indicates if the collection is highlighted. |
| `items[].dateFrom` | string | Start date of the collection's validity. |
| `items[].dateTo` | string | End date of the collection's validity. |
| `items[].totalSku` | number | Total number of SKUs in the collection. |
| `items[].totalProducts` | number | Total number of products in the collection. |
| `items[].type` | string | Type of the collection. |
| `items[].lastModifiedBy` | string/null | User who last modified the collection, if available. |

This endpoint provides useful information to manage and view catalog collections with pagination support.

**Official Documentation**: [VTEX Checkout API - GET /api/checkout/pub/profiles](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/checkout-api#get-/api/checkout/pub/profiles)

This API endpoint retrieves the checkout profiles associated with a given email from the VTEX platform.

### Request

**Method:** `GET`

**URL:**

``` plaintext
https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/checkout/pub/profiles?email={{email}}

 ```

### Response

A successful response returns a JSON object with the user's profile information, available accounts, addresses, and contact details.

#### Example Response

``` json
{
  "userProfileId": "",
  "profileProvider": "",
  "availableAccounts": [
    {
      "accountId": "",
      "paymentSystem": "",
      "paymentSystemName": "",
      "cardNumber": "",
      "bin": "",
      "availableAddresses": [""],
      "expirationDate": "",
      "isExpired": true,
      "accountStatus": null
    }
  ],
  "availableAddresses": [
    {
      "addressType": "",
      "receiverName": "",
      "addressId": "",
      "isDisposable": true,
      "postalCode": "",
      "city": "",
      "state": "",
      "country": "",
      "street": "",
      "number": "",
      "neighborhood": "",
      "complement": null,
      "reference": null,
      "geoCoordinates": []
    }
  ],
  "contactInformation": [],
  "contacts": [],
  "contactsInfo": [],
  "userProfile": {
    "email": "",
    "firstName": "",
    "lastName": "",
    "document": "",
    "documentType": "",
    "phone": "",
    "corporateName": null,
    "tradeName": null,
    "corporateDocument": null,
    "stateInscription": null,
    "corporatePhone": null,
    "isCorporate": true,
    "profileCompleteOnLoading": null,
    "profileErrorOnLoading": null,
    "customerClass": null
  },
  "isComplete": true
}

 ```

### Fields Description

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `userProfileId` | string | Unique identifier of the user profile. |
| `profileProvider` | string | Profile provider source. |
| `availableAccounts` | array | Array of available payment accounts. |
| `availableAccounts[].accountId` | string | Account ID for the payment method. |
| `availableAccounts[].paymentSystem` | string | Payment system ID. |
| `availableAccounts[].paymentSystemName` | string | Name of the payment system. |
| `availableAccounts[].cardNumber` | string | Masked card number. |
| `availableAccounts[].bin` | string | Card BIN (first digits of the card). |
| `availableAccounts[].availableAddresses` | array | Associated address IDs. |
| `availableAccounts[].expirationDate` | string | Card expiration date. |
| `availableAccounts[].isExpired` | boolean | Indicates whether the card is expired. |
| `availableAccounts[].accountStatus` | string/null | Account status, if applicable. |
| `availableAddresses` | array | List of user addresses. |
| `availableAddresses[].addressType` | string | Type of address (e.g., residential, billing). |
| `availableAddresses[].receiverName` | string | Name of the address receiver. |
| `availableAddresses[].addressId` | string | ID of the address. |
| `availableAddresses[].isDisposable` | boolean | Indicates if the address is disposable. |
| `availableAddresses[].postalCode` | string | Postal code. |
| `availableAddresses[].city` | string | City name. |
| `availableAddresses[].state` | string | State abbreviation. |
| `availableAddresses[].country` | string | Country code. |
| `availableAddresses[].street` | string | Street name. |
| `availableAddresses[].number` | string | Street number. |
| `availableAddresses[].neighborhood` | string | Neighborhood name. |
| `availableAddresses[].complement` | string/null | Complement field. |
| `availableAddresses[].reference` | string/null | Reference info. |
| `availableAddresses[].geoCoordinates` | array | Geographic coordinates. |
| `contactInformation` | array | List of contact information fields (deprecated). |
| `contacts` | array | Contact details. |
| `contactsInfo` | array | Detailed contact information. |
| `userProfile` | object | Object containing user profile data. |
| `userProfile.email` | string | Email address. |
| `userProfile.firstName` | string | First name. |
| `userProfile.lastName` | string | Last name. |
| `userProfile.document` | string | Document number. |
| `userProfile.documentType` | string | Type of document (e.g., CPF, CNPJ). |
| `userProfile.phone` | string | Phone number. |
| `userProfile.corporateName` | string/null | Corporate name (for B2B users). |
| `userProfile.tradeName` | string/null | Trade name. |
| `userProfile.corporateDocument` | string/null | Corporate document number. |
| `userProfile.stateInscription` | string/null | State inscription. |
| `userProfile.corporatePhone` | string/null | Corporate phone number. |
| `userProfile.isCorporate` | boolean | Indicates if the profile is corporate. |
| `userProfile.profileCompleteOnLoading` | boolean/null | Whether profile was complete on loading. |
| `userProfile.profileErrorOnLoading` | boolean/null | Whether profile had errors on loading. |
| `userProfile.customerClass` | string/null | Customer class, if defined. |
| `isComplete` | boolean | Indicates if the profile is complete. |

This endpoint is useful for retrieving a customer's saved profile and contextual purchase details during the checkout flow.
