item.name: ALTERNATIVE Get BK / List Credit Cards

request.description:
**Official Documentation**: Not officially documented — alternative retrieval method.

This endpoint provides an alternative way to retrieve credit card information by querying the `BK` data entity using the `userId` (contract ID).

### Request

**Method:** `GET`

**URL:**

``` plaintext
https://{{accountName}}.myvtex.com/api/dataentities/BK/search?userId={{contractId}}

 ```

> No request body is required. 
  

### Response

Returns a `200 OK` status with an array of objects containing credit card metadata linked to the provided user ID.

#### Example Response

``` json
[
  {
    "name": "Visa ending 1234",
    "userId": "2da4e9ab-050b-11f0-b37f-f4b136dbcce1",
    "value": "someTokenOrValue",
    "id": "BK-123",
    "accountId": "5f1fe23b-9fd1-417d-a4aa-14df38e7746e",
    "accountName": "qastore",
    "dataEntityId": "BK"
  }
]

 ```

### Fields Description

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | string | Name or label associated with the credit card. |
| `userId` | string | Unique identifier of the user (contract ID). |
| `value` | string | Token or reference value for the credit card. |
| `id` | string | ID of the document within the BK entity. |
| `accountId` | string | ID of the VTEX account. |
| `accountName` | string | Name of the VTEX account. |
| `dataEntityId` | string | Data entity ID (BK in this case). |

This method is helpful when alternative access to credit card references is needed for integration or validation flows.

item.description: These APIs are auxiliary and must support the completion of contracts, especially the Restrictions fields.

item.name: Card Token Systems

request.description:
## Request

- **Method**: `GET`
    
- **URL**: `{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/payments/pvt/accounts/{{id}}`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `ViewPayments` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).
    

Retrieves data for a specific token by its ID (unique identifier automatically generated during token creation).

### Path parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| id | Yes | string | Token ID (unique identifier automatically generated during token creation and stored in the system). |

## Response

### Successful response

- Status Code: `200 OK` - Returns a card token object.
    
- Body:
    

``` json
{
  "id": "string",
  "providerId": "string",
  "orderGroup": "string",
  "profileId": "string",
  "shopperId": "string",
  "email": "string",
  "card": {
    "paymentSystemId": "string",
    "paymentSystemName": "string",
    "firstDigits": "000000",
    "lastDigits": "0000",
    "address": {
      "addressType": "string",
      "addressId": "string",
      "postalCode": "string",
      "street": "string",
      "neighborhood": "string",
      "city": "string",
      "state": "string",
      "country": "string",
      "number": "string",
      "complement": "string"
    },
    "holderName": "string"
  },
  "cardTokenData": {
    "type": "string",
    "value": "string",
    "expiration": "YYYY-MM",
    "label": "string",
    "providerCardTokenId": "string",
    "useCvvForAuthorization": "boolean",
    "href": "string"
  },
  "extraData": {
    "string": "string"
  }
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Token ID (unique identifier automatically generated during token creation and stored in the system). |
| providerId | string | Name of the connector's owner account (`accountName`) used to create the token. |
| orderGroup | string | Order group ID, a segment of the order ID that groups all orders related to the same purchase. For example, in the order ID `v71021570str-02`, the order group ID is `v71021570str`. |
| profileId | string | Profile ID in the Profile System (used for contract identification). |
| shopperId | string | Shopper identification. |
| email | string | Email is used only if neither `profileId` nor `orderGroup` are provided (rare use). |
| card | object | Card object. |
| card.paymentSystemId | string | Payment system ID in the Payment Gateway. |
| card.paymentSystemName | string | Card brand, e.g. Visa, Mastercard. |
| card.firstDigits | string | Card BIN (first six digits). |
| card.lastDigits | string | The last four digits of the card. |
| card.address | object | Card address object. |
| card.address.addressType | string | Address type. For example, `Residential` or `Pickup`. |
| card.address.addressId | string | Address identifier. |
| card.address.postalCode | string | Postal code (ZIP/CEP). |
| card.address.street | string | Street name. |
| card.address.neighborhood | string | Neighborhood name. |
| card.address.city | string | City name. |
| card.address.state | string | State name. |
| card.address.country | string | Country name. |
| card.address.number | string | Street number. |
| card.address.complement | string | Address complement (e.g., apartment, building). |
| card.holderName | string | Name of the cardholder as printed on the card. |
| cardTokenData | object | Card token data object. |
| cardTokenData.type | string | Type of token (e.g., FILE, TOKEN_CLIENT_ID, TOKEN_VALUE). |
| cardTokenData.value | string | The token value to be used in transactions. |
| cardTokenData.expiration | string | Token expiration date in `YYYY-MM` format. |
| cardTokenData.label | string | Token alias (an alternative name to simplify token identification). |
| cardTokenData.providerCardTokenId | string | Client ID used to retrieve the token from the provider. |
| cardTokenData.useCvvForAuthorization | boolean | Flag indicating if CVV is required (`true`) or not (`false`). |
| cardTokenData.href | string | URL of the token file stored by the provider. |
| extraData | object | Dictionary for additional data. |

#### Unsuccessful responses

| HTTP Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 400 | Invalid request data. |
| 401 | Invalid or unauthorized auth headers. |
| 403 | Missing auth headers. |
| 404 | Token not previously registered. |
| 500 | Internal server error – unexpected issue on the server. Retry after a short delay or contact support if the problem persists. |

body.raw:
{
   "providerId":"string",
   "profileId":"string optional if email or orderGroup exists",
   "email": "string optional if profileId or orderGroup exists",
   "orderGroup": "string optional if profileId or email exists",
   "card":{
      "paymentSystemName":"string",
      "paymentSystemId":"string optional",
      "firstDigits":"string",
      "lastDigits":"string",
      "address":{
         "addressType":"string",
         "addressId":"string",
         "postalCode":"string",
         "street":"string",
         "neighborhood":"string",
         "city":"string",
         "state":"string",
         "country":"string",
         "number":"string",
         "complement":"string"
      },
      "holderName":"string"
   },
   "cardTokenData":{
      "type":"string",
      "value":"string required if type is TOKEN_VALUE",
      "expiration":"string",
      "label":"string optional",
      "href":"string required if type is FILE",
      "providerCardTokenId":"string required if type is TOKEN_CLIENT_ID",
      "useCvvForAuthorization": false // boolean optional default false
   },
   "extraData":{
      "additionalProp1":"string",
      "additionalProp2":"string",
      "additionalProp3":"string"
   }
}

request.description:
## Request

- **Method**: `POST`
    
- **URL**: `{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/card-token-vault/tokens`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `CreateCardTokens` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).
    

Registers a new card token in the system.

### Request body

``` json
{
   "providerId": "string",
   "profileId": "string optional if email or orderGroup exists",
   "shopperId": "string optional, mandatory only if a personal card is used",
   "email": "string optional if profileId or orderGroup exists",
   "orderGroup": "string optional if profileId or email exists",
   "card":{
      "paymentSystemName": "string",
      "paymentSystemId": "string optional",
      "firstDigits": "string",
      "lastDigits": "string",
      "address":{
         "addressType": "string",
         "addressId": "string",
         "postalCode": "string",
         "street": "string",
         "neighborhood": "string",
         "city": "string",
         "state": "string",
         "country": "string",
         "number": "string",
         "complement": "string"
      },
      "holderName": "string"
   },
   "cardTokenData":{
      "type": "string",
      "value": "string required if type is TOKEN_VALUE",
      "expiration": "string",
      "label": "string optional",
      "href": "string required if type is FILE",
      "providerCardTokenId": "string required if type is TOKEN_CLIENT_ID",
      "useCvvForAuthorization": "boolean optional, default false"
   },
   "extraData":{
      "additionalProp1": "string",
      "additionalProp2": "string",
      "additionalProp3": "string"
   }
}

 ```

| Field | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| providerId | Yes | string | Name of the connector's owner account (`accountName`) used to create the token. |
| profileId | No | string | Profile ID in the Profile System (used for contract identification). This field is optional if `email` or `orderGroup` exists. |
| shopperId | No | string | Shopper identification. This field is optional and only applicable if a personal card is used. |
| email | No | string | Email is used only if neither `profileId` nor `orderGroup` are provided (rare use). |
| orderGroup | No | string | Order group ID, a segment of the order ID that groups all orders related to the same purchase. For example, in the order ID `v71021570str-02`, the order group ID is `v71021570str`. This field is optional if `email` or `profileId` exists. |
| card | yes | object | Card object. |
| card.paymentSystemId | No | string | Payment system ID in the Payment Gateway. |
| card.paymentSystemName | Yes | string | Card brand, e.g. Visa, Mastercard. |
| card.firstDigits | Yes | string | Card BIN (first six digits). |
| card.lastDigits | Yes | string | The last four digits of the card. |
| card.address | No | object | Card address object. |
| card.address.addressType | No | string | Address type. For example, `Residential` or `Pickup`. |
| card.address.addressId | No | string | Address identifier. |
| card.address.postalCode | No | string | Postal code (ZIP/CEP). |
| card.address.street | No | string | Street name. |
| card.address.neighborhood | No | string | Neighborhood name. |
| card.address.city | No | string | City name. |
| card.address.state | No | string | State name. |
| card.address.country | No | string | Country name. |
| card.address.number | No | string | Street number. |
| card.address.complement | No | string | Address complement (e.g., apartment, building). |
| card.holderName | No | string | Name of the cardholder as printed on the card. |
| cardTokenData | Yes | object | Card token data object. |
| cardTokenData.type | Yes | string | Type of token (e.g., FILE, TOKEN_CLIENT_ID, TOKEN_VALUE). |
| cardTokenData.value | No | string | The token value to be used in transactions. This field is required if the `type` is TOKEN_VALUE. |
| cardTokenData.expiration | Yes | string | Token expiration date in `YYYY-MM` format. |
| cardTokenData.label | No | string | Token alias (an alternative name to simplify token identification). |
| cardTokenData.href | No | string | URL of the token file stored by the provider. This field is required if the `type` is FILE. |
| cardTokenData.providerCardTokenId | No | string | Client ID used to retrieve the token from the provider. This field is required if the `type` is TOKEN_CLIENT_ID. |
| cardTokenData.useCvvForAuthorization | No | boolean | Flag indicating if CVV is required (`true`) or not (`false`). Default: `false`. |
| extraData | No | object | Dictionary for additional data. |

### Response

#### Successful response

- Status Code: `201 Created` - token saved.
    
- Body: No content.
    

#### Unsuccessful responses

| HTTP Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 400 | Problem validating request data. |
| 401 | Invalid or unauthorized auth headers. |
| 403 | Missing auth headers. |
| 409 | Token already exists. |
| 500 | Internal server error – unexpected issue on the server. Retry after a short delay or contact support if the problem persists. |

## Request

- **Method**: `PUT`
    
- **URL**: `{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/card-token-vault/tokens/{{id}}`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `ManageCardTokens` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).
    

Updates data for an existing token.

This endpoint requires sending the complete request body from the **Create Card Token** endpoint, except for the `card` object.

### Path parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| id | Yes | string | Token ID (unique identifier automatically generated during token creation and stored in the system). |

### Request body

``` json
{
   "providerId":"string",
   "profileId": "string optional if email or orderGroup exists",
   "shopperId": "string optional, mandatory only if a personal card is used",
   "email": "string optional if profileId or orderGroup exists",
   "orderGroup": "string optional if profileId or email exists",
   "cardTokenData":{
      "type": "string",
      "value": "string required if type is TOKEN_VALUE",
      "expiration": "string",
      "label": "string optional",
      "href": "string required if type is FILE",
      "providerCardTokenId": "string required if type is TOKEN_CLIENT_ID",
      "useCvvForAuthorization": "boolean optional, default false"
   },
   "extraData":{
      "additionalProp1": "string",
      "additionalProp2": "string",
      "additionalProp3": "string"
   }
}

 ```

| Field | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| providerId | Yes | string | Name of the owner account of the connector used to create the token. |
| profileId | No | string | Profile ID in the Profile System. This field is optional if `email` or `orderGroup` exists. |
| shopperId | No | string | Shopper identification. This field is optional and only applicable if a personal card is used. |
| email | No | string | Email is used only if neither `profileId` nor `orderGroup` are provided (rare use). |
| orderGroup | No | string | Order group ID, a segment of the order ID that groups all orders related to the same purchase. For example, in the order ID `v71021570str-02`, the order group ID is `v71021570str`. This field is optional if `email` or `profileId` exists. |
| cardTokenData | Yes | object | Card token data object. |
| cardTokenData.type | Yes | string | Type of token (e.g., FILE, TOKEN_CLIENT_ID, TOKEN_VALUE). |
| cardTokenData.value | No | string | The token value to be used in transactions. This field is required if the `type` is TOKEN_VALUE. |
| cardTokenData.expiration | Yes | string | Token expiration date in `YYYY-MM` format. |
| cardTokenData.label | No | string | Token alias (an alternative name to simplify token identification). |
| cardTokenData.href | No | string | URL of the token file stored by the provider. This field is required if the `type` is FILE. |
| cardTokenData.providerCardTokenId | No | string | Client ID used to retrieve the token from the provider. This field is required if the `type` is TOKEN_CLIENT_ID. |
| cardTokenData.useCvvForAuthorization | No | boolean | Flag indicating if CVV is required (`true`) or not (`false`). Default: `false`. |
| extraData | No | object | Dictionary for additional data. |

### Response

#### Successful response

- Status Code: `201 Created` - token saved.
    
- Body: No content.
    

#### Unsuccessful responses

| HTTP Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 400 | Problem validating request data. |
| 401 | Invalid or unauthorized auth headers. |
| 403 | Missing auth headers. |
| 404 | Token not previously registered. |
| 500 | Internal server error – unexpected issue on the server. Retry after a short delay or contact support if the problem persists. |

## Request

- **Method**: `DELETE`
    
- **URL**: `{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/payments/pvt/accounts/{{id}}`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `MakePayments` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).
    

Deletes a token from the system.

This endpoint doesn’t require a request body.

### Path parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| id | Yes | string | Token ID (unique identifier automatically generated during token creation and stored in the system). |

## Response

### Successful response

- Status Code: `200 OK` - token deleted.
    
- Body: No content.
    

### Unsuccessful responses

| HTTP Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 401 | Invalid or unauthorized auth headers. |
| 403 | Missing auth headers. |
| 404 | Token not previously registered. |
| 500 | Internal server error – unexpected issue on the server. Retry after a short delay or contact support if the problem persists. |

## Request

- **Method**: `POST`
    
- **URL**: `{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/card-token-vault/tokens/import`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `multipart/form-data`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `ImportCardToken` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).
    

Imports tokens in bulk via an XLSX file. Note that:

- **File size and type:** Only XLSX files with a maximum size of 20MB are allowed.
    
- **Simultaneous imports:** Each account can only trigger one import at a time. If an import is in progress, you need to wait for it to finish to trigger another import.
    
- **Auditing:** All import actions are audited.
    

### Request body

```
'file=@"/C:/test/test.xlsx"'

 ```

The body of the request will contain your XLSX file, which you'll send as a form data part.

The XLSX file must have the first row with the following headers:

``` json
accountName,providerId,profileId,paymentSystemName,cardFirstDigits,cardLastDigits,cardAddressType,cardAddressPostalCode,cardAddressStreet,cardAddressNeighborhood,cardAddressCity,cardAddressState,cardAddressCountry,cardAddressNumber,cardAddressComplement,cardHolderName,tokenType,tokenValue,tokenExpiration,tokenLabel,tokenProviderCardTokenId,tokenUseCvvForAuthorization,tokenHref,extraData,email,shopperId

 ```

The `extraData` field should contain a JSON with a dictionary of additional data, or an empty JSON.

## Response

### Successful response

- Status Code: `202 Accepted` - File received.
    
- Body: Returns an import the Token ID in the system, which can be used to retrieve the import status and the report from the import.
    

``` json
{
"id": "string"
}

 ```

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Import ID. |

### Unsuccessful responses

| HTTP Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 400 | Incorrect `Content-Type` or invalid file type. |
| 401 | Invalid or unauthorized auth headers. |
| 403 | Missing auth headers. |
| 500 | Internal server error – unexpected issue on the server. Retry after a short delay or contact support if the problem persists. |

## Request

- **Method**: `GET`
    
- **URL**: `{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/card-token-vault/tokens/import/{{importId}}`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `GetImportCardTokenStatus` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).
    

Returns the status and progress percentage of an import.

### Path parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| importId | Yes | string | Import ID. |

## Response

### Successful response

- Status Code: `200 OK` - import data obtained.
    
- Body: Returns the import status.
    

``` json
{
    "status": "RUNNING",
    "id": "string",
    "completionPercentage":"integer",
    "createdDate": "string","
    "updatedDate": "string",
    "reportUrl":"string optional if the import process had any error"
}

 ```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| status | string | Response status, which can be: `DONE`, `RUNNING`, `CREATED` or `FAILED`. |
| id | string | Import ID. |
| completionPercentage | integer | Importing completion percentage. |
| createdDate | string | Creation date. |
| updatedDate | string | Last update date. |
| reportUrl | string | Report URL. This field is optional if the import process had an error. |

### Unsuccessful responses

| HTTP Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 401 | Invalid or unauthorized auth headers. |
| 403 | Missing auth headers. |
| 404 | Import not found. |
| 500 | Internal server error – unexpected issue on the server. Retry after a short delay or contact support if the problem persists. |

## Request

- **Method**: `GET`
    
- **URL**: `{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/card-token-vault/tokens/import/{{importId}}/report`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `GetImportCardTokensReport` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).
    

Returns the import report, indicating lines with issues.

### Path parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| importId | Yes | string | Import ID. |

## Response

### Successful response

- Status Code: `302 Found` - redirects the user to the report download URL.
    

### Unsuccessful responses

| HTTP Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 401 | Invalid or unauthorized auth headers. |
| 403 | Missing auth headers. |
| 404 | Import not found. |
| 500 | Internal server error – unexpected issue on the server. Retry after a short delay or contact support if the problem persists. |

item.description:
The Card Token Vault API is responsible for creating and updating card tokens, as well as supporting bulk imports. Card tokens are unique identifiers that represent securely stored credit card data. The Payment Gateway API enables the retrieval and deletion of card tokens.

> ℹ️ This API's endpoints can be used for personal cards (cards associated with a single buyer) and shared cards (cards used by more than one person and associated with a specific contract). However, in a scenario of operations with personal cards, the `shopperId` must be additionally sent in the [Created Card Token](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/2352637/2sAYkKGcHD#7fe79cbd-2f5b-420b-9993-f4b4af8265d1) or [Update Card Token](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/2352637/2sAYkKGcHD#cba5b948-a4ad-4eb8-8659-7c32a3bd232b) endpoints.

item.name: B2B User Migration

request.description:
## Request

- **Method**: `POST`
    
- **URL**: `{{accountname}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/authenticator/storefront/users?isLegacyPassword=false`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `VtexIdclientAutCookie_{{accountname}}={{VtexIdclientAutCookie}}` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `Create user` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3) (VTEX ID > User Management).
    

Register a new user in the [VTEX ID](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-id-api).

> ℹ️ All users are created without any Organization Unit or storefront permissions assigned to them. 
  

### Query parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| isLegacyPassword | Yes | boolean | Indicates whether the user’s password recovery should be handled by an external service or by the user themself during their first login. The default value is `false`, meaning the user will set their password. |

### Request body

``` json
{
    "identifier": "unique_login_key",
    "identifierType": "username"
}

 ```

| Field | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| identifier | Yes | string | This user will be registered with a `unique_login_key`, which is their unique identifier during the login process. The `unique_login_key` is an open, case-insensitive field that accepts 3 to 70 characters, including special characters and whitespace. |
| identifierType | Yes | string | Indicate the type of login key added, including values such as `username`, `email`, or `telephone`. Currently, only the `username` value is supported. |

> ⚠️ Once you create a user, you cannot edit or delete it. If any data was entered incorrectly, the easiest solution is to create a new username with the correct details.

## Request

- **Method**: `GET`
    
- **URL**: `{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/vtexid/pvt/user/info?user={{identifier}}`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `X-VTEX-API-AppKey` and `X-VTEX-API-AppToken` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    

Search for a user by their identifier (username, email, or telephone).

### Query parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| identifier | Yes | string | This information must be provided in URL-encoded format. |

## Request

- **Method**: `GET`
    
- **URL**: `{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/organization-units/v1?page=4&pageSize=100`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `X-VTEX-API-AppKey` and `X-VTEX-API-AppToken` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `Edit Organization Unit` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3) (Organization Units > Units).
    

Retrieves a paginated list of all Organization Units, which can be navigated using the `page` and `pageSize` parameters.

> ℹ️ Organization Units represent the organizations to which a buyer user belongs. 
  

### Query parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| page | Yes | number | Page number of the results. |
| pageSize | Yes | number | Number of items per page. |

## Request

- **Method**: `POST`
    
- **URL**: `{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/organization-units/v1`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `X-VTEX-API-AppKey` and `X-VTEX-API-AppToken` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `Edit Organization Unit` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3) (Organization Units > Units).
    

Creates a new Organization Unit. All units are initially created at the root level.

### Request body

``` json
{
    "name": "Unit Name"
}

 ```

| Field | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| name | Yes | string | Name of the Organization Unit to be created. |

## Request

- **Method**: `POST`
    
- **URL**: `{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/vtexid/organization-units/{{organizationUnit}}/users`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `X-VTEX-API-AppKey` and `X-VTEX-API-AppToken` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `Edit Organization Unit` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3) (Organization Units > Units).
    

Links a user to an Organization Unit.

### Path parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| organizationUnit | Yes | string | Name of the Organizational Unit where the user will be assigned. |

### Request body

``` json
{
    "userIds": ["userId"]
}

 ```

| Field | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| userIds | Yes | array | Identification of the user to whom an Organization Unit will be assigned. |

## Request

- **Method**: `GET`
    
- **URL**: `{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/vtexid/organization-units/{{organizationUnit}}/users`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `X-VTEX-API-AppKey` and `X-VTEX-API-AppToken` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `View Organization Unit` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3) (Organization Units > Units).
    

Lists all users stored in an Organization Unit.

### Path parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| organizationUnit | Yes | string | Name of the Organizational Unit where users are stored. |

## Request - **Method**: `POST` - **URL**: `{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/license-manager/storefront/users` - **Authentication**: Requires `X-VTEX-API-AppKey` and `X-VTEX-API-AppToken` in the headers. - **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json` - **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `Edit Storefront User Permissions` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3) (License manager > Services access control). Assigns one or more administrative roles to a buyer user within an organization. Each administrative role is identified by a unique `roleId`, represented as a number. You can find the available `roleId` values and their corresponding permissions in the table below: | Permission | Available Actions | RoleID | | --- | --- | --- | | **Organizational Unit Admin** | Manage Organization & Contract | 1 | | **Order Approver** | Approve Orders | 2 | | **Order Modifier** | Modify Orders | 3 | | **Buyer** | Place Orders | 4 | | **Personal Cards User** | Use ad hoc credit card | 5 | | **Contract Manager** | View My Contract Orders | 6 | | **Buyer Organization Manager** | View My Org Unit Orders | 7 | | **Contract Viewer** | Manage Authentication
View My Cards
View Addresses | 8 | | **Address Manager** | Manage Addresses | 9 | ### Request body ``` json { "id": "userId", "roleIds": [1, 2, 3] } ``` | Field | Required | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | id | Yes | string | Identification of the user to whom one or more roles will be assigned. | | rolesIds | Yes | array of numbers | Identification number of the assigned role. |

## Request

- **Method**: `GET`
    
- **URL**: `https://{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/license-manager/storefront/users/{{username}}/roles`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `X-VTEX-API-AppKey` and `X-VTEX-API-AppToken` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `Save Storefront User Permissions` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3) (License manager > Services access control).
    

List the administrative roles for a storefront user. For more information, see [Fetch storefront user roles by ID](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/storefront-permissions-api#get-/api/license-manager/storefront/users/-userId-/roles).

### Path parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| username | Yes | string | Username identification. |

## Request

- **Method**: `POST`
    
- **URL**: `http://{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/dataentities/shopper/documents?_schema=v1`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `X-VTEX-API-AppKey` and `X-VTEX-API-AppToken` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `Dynamic storage generic resources` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3) (Dynamic Storage).
    

Populates and manages users’ profile information. Shopper data serves as the source of truth for details as first and last name, document, telephone, email, and more.

For more information, see [VTEX Developers - Master Data APIs](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/masterdata-api#post-/api/dataentities/-acronym-/documents).

### Query parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| _schema | Yes | string | Version identification. |

### Request body

``` json
{
    "userId": "userId",
    "firstName": "User First Name 2",
    "lastName": "User Last Name",
    "document": "111.444.000-00",
    "email": "user@vtex.com",
    "phone": "5583987499600",
    "documentType": "cpf",
    "cards": []
}

 ```

| Field | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| userId | Yes | string | User identification. |
| firstName | Yes | string | The first name of the user. |
| lastName | Yes | string | The last name of the user. |
| document | Yes | string | The document number of the user. |
| email | Yes | string | The email of the user. |
| phone | Yes | string | The phone number of the user. |
| documentType | Yes | string | Type of document (e.g., CPF, CNPJ). |
| cards | Yes | array | Cards information. |

## Request

- **Method**: `GET`
    
- **URL**: `http://{{accountName}}.vtexcommercestable.com.br/api/dataentities/shopper/search?_schema=v1&_where=userId={{userId}}&_fields=_all`
    
- **Authentication**: Requires `X-VTEX-API-AppKey` and `X-VTEX-API-AppToken` in the headers.
    
- **HTTP Headers**: Accept `application/json` / Content-Type `application/json`
    
- **Permissions**: The user or application key must have the `Dynamic storage generic resources` [License Manager resource](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3) (Dynamic Storage).
    

List the stored shopper data. For more information, see [VTEX Developers - Master Data APIs](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/masterdata-api#post-/api/dataentities/-acronym-/documents).

### Query parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| _schema | Yes | string | Version identification. |
| _where | Yes | string | Username identification. |
| _fields | Yes | string | Identification of the shopper profile fields that will be displayed. |

### Path parameter

| Parameter | Required | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| userId | Yes | string | Username identification. |

item.description:
This guide explains a secure process for migrating a merchant’s user base - including user passwords - from external platforms to VTEX.

The migration involves the following operations:

1. Creating users at VTEX
    
2. Adding users to Buyer Organizations
    
3. Assigning administrative roles within Buyer Organizations
    
4. Registering profile information

item.name: Prospects

request.description:
This endpoint allows you to add a new document entity to the system.

#### Request Body

- `email` (string): The email of the entity.
    
- `firstName` (string): The first name of the entity.
    
- `lastName` (string): The last name of the entity.
    
- `document` (string): The document number of the entity.
    
- `documentType` (string): The type of document.
    
- `businessDocument` (string): The business document of the entity.
    
- `homePhone` (string): The home phone number of the entity.
    
- `cellPhone` (string): The cell phone number of the entity.
    
- `corporateName` (string): The corporate name of the entity.
    
- `fancyName` (string): The fancy name of the entity.
    
- `isPJ` (boolean): Indicates if the entity is a legal entity.
    
- `stateRegistration` (string): The state registration of the entity.
    
- `isFreeStateRegistration` (boolean): Indicates if the state registration is free.
    

#### Response

- `Id` (string): The ID of the newly added document entity.
    
- `Href` (string): The URL of the newly added document entity.
    
- `DocumentId` (string): The document ID of the newly added document entity.

### Add New ProspectEntity

item.description:
These APIs are for creating the contract, and are expected to be used only for store management.  
In this collection there are auxiliary APIs to support filling out the contract, especially the restrictions object.
